title: Protect Animals
description: Named animals never take damage. Also removes some damage sources to animals.
body:
Named animals never take damage. Also removes some damage sources to animals (listed below). Includes allays and striders, but not bats, hoglins, or villagers.

Specific changes:
- Make animals damageable again by naming them `killable`.
- Bees and dolphins do not drown.
- Water animals (squid, axolotl, nautilus) do not take damage when out of water.
- Named pigs (except those named `killable`) do not become zombified piglins when struck by lightning.

**VERSION 1.21.4 AND EARLIER:**
- Fish are not protected. (Fish are protected in later versions.)
- Bees ONLY take damage from players and other mobs.
- Named pigs can still become zombified piglins when struck by lightning.

**VERSIONS 1.21 AND 1.20.4:**
- Cannot make animals damageable again once they're named.
